NAME: Jordan Blake
NICHE/EXPERTISE: B2B SaaS pricing and monetization strategy (usage-based models, packaging, product-led monetization)
TARGET AUDIENCE: B2B SaaS founders, Heads of Product, Finance leaders, and RevOps teams at seed to Series D companies
UNIQUE PERSPECTIVE: Pricing is a product capability, not a quarterly spreadsheet; teams should ship pricing experiments like features and measure with the same rigor.
